name: Emergency Announcement
description:
As the darker side of this site has surfaced into public view, we need to talk. I'll try to keep this short, but it has come to a point where this announcement is simply inevitable.

First, if you don't know how bad things are concerning the site (or its owner)'s irresponsibility, favouritism, and severe legal and moral concerns, check this post by our dear Mikale, one of the (now leaving) moderators.

The rest of the announcement are all in the initial message of this bot.

Have a good day <3
creator: Whale Z
